models.title: Toman 10.25 in. Matte Black Outdoor Single Sconce
source_fields:
The Toman 10.25 in. Matte Black Outdoor Single Sconce by Kichler is the perfect blend of style and functionality for your residential lighting needs. Designed to provide a sleek, modern look, this sconce is ideal for enhancing the aesthetic appeal of your outdoor space.

  • The matte finish offers a sophisticated look that complements any exterior decor.
  • Its black color provides a timeless and versatile appeal for various design themes.
  • Designed for wall-only installation, ensuring easy and secure mounting.
  • The downward light orientation creates focused illumination for enhanced visibility and ambiance.
  • Comes with a 1-year limited warranty, providing peace of mind and reliable performance.

Elevate your outdoor lighting with the Toman 10.25 in. Matte Black Outdoor Single Sconce, combining elegance, durability, and excellent functionality.

models.title: Independence Matte Black Outdoor Double Sc
source_fields:
Introducing the Independence Matte Black Outdoor Double Sconce by Kichler. This elegant and versatile lighting fixture is perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any residential outdoor space. With its sleek matte finish and reversible light orientation, it is designed to enhance your home's exterior with both style and functionality.

  • The matte finish provides a sleek, modern look that complements any outdoor decor.
  • Its reversible light orientation allows for flexible installation, ensuring optimal lighting in any direction.
  • Designed for wall-only installation, making it ideal for illuminating entryways or patios.
  • The durable construction ensures long-lasting performance, even in harsh weather conditions.
  • Backed by a 1-year limited warranty, offering peace of mind and reliable support.

Enhance your home's exterior with the Independence Matte Black Outdoor Double Sconce by Kichler. Its stylish design and versatile features make it the perfect addition to any residential setting.
